evidence: charm_pin_pullback_long contributes $1261.5 across 34 VALID_0DTE trades with median hold near 5 minutes, but owns the global -513.4 MAE. The worst entry combined ES-VWAP 26.69, negative VWAP acceleration, pullback-from-high 9.25, rolling-high distance 14.25, and first meaningful profit only after about 80 minutes. Protected extended-VWAP winners argue against a global cap.
name: Charm Pin Early-Progress Tail Classifier
risk: Static config boundaries may still remove profitable delayed recoveries or fail to catch the path-dependent tail; a path-aware classifier can overfit unless validated against protected fast-winner UTCS.
trigger: charm_pin_pullback_long high-extension or recent-high-rejection entries that fail to print early positive progress after entry.
validation_metric: Reduce charm_pin_pullback_long worst MAE toward <= -403 while retaining >=90% charm-pin PnL, >=95% protected fast extended-VWAP winners, total net profit >=98% of run_029, and slow_12h remains 0.

evidence: VALID_1DTE_ONLY breakout fallback produced 20 trades and $1305 PnL, while direct 1DTE quality tightening repeatedly hurt score and net profit. This suggests companion routing, not direct tightening.
name: 1DTE Pullback Companion Profile
risk: Router overlap may cannibalize the profitable breakout_long_1dte baseline or the companion may be unreachable.
trigger: 0DTE unavailable, 1DTE map valid, and ES state resembles pullback/reclaim rather than clean breakout continuation.
validation_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL remains >= $1305, 1DTE average MAE improves versus -123.86, total net profit remains >=98% of run_029, and score is flat or better.
